CMD_CHARACTER_DESCRIPTION_CP_010.Text:
A close-range Brawler who demonstrates outstanding physical potential.
Defeat enemies up-close-and-personal, choosing attacks that suit the situation.

• His Potential, "High Gear," makes it easier to dash as his Cursed Energy Level increases, letting you slip into the enemy's pocket for melee engagements.
• Catch opponents off-guard with the Cursed Energy Technique Divergent Fist, then chain into Combo Strike for massive damage!

CMD_CHARACTER_DESCRIPTION_CP_020.Text:
A Striker with close-range attacks that assail friend and foe alike over a wide area.
Your powerful attacks send even allies flying, and give you the run of the battlefield.
Although these attacks leave you wide open, they put you in an invulnerable state, so keep an eye out for chances to maneuver and attack!

• His Potential, "Reverse Cursed Technique," grants recovery from damage taken when you counterattack, so stay on the offensive.
• The Potential "Intimidation," which activates from Cursed Energy Level 3, lets you freeze surrounding foes when you attack.
Stop opponents in their tracks, then chain into a devastating attack!

A close-range Combo Master that specializes in coordinated strikes with Shikigami.
Use your Shikigami as the situation warrants, offering utility for attacking or support.

• Summon Nue or Divine Dog: Totality with the Ten Shadows Technique to trigger Shikigami follow-up attacks.
You can command your Shikigami to attack on its own, letting you strike at foes while at a distance!
• His Potential, "Technique Interpretation," lets you counter with Shikigami when attacked. Get ready to attack with impunity!

You can move while giving attack commands. Press + while a Shikigami is summoned to unsummon it. Summoning ends when Fushiguro lacks sufficient Cursed Energy. Cursed Energy Level 1: Summon Nue with . CMD_CHARACTER_DESCRIPTION_CP_040.Text:
A mid-range Striker who inflicts unique Resonance and Hairpin attacks on foes.
Marking opponents to apply pressure is the key to take the initiative in any battle.

• Straw Doll Technique: Hairpin can be detonated any time after you drive in the nail, so aim for timing that is difficult to guard.
• No need to panic even if the enemy closes the gap; you can take them on with a well-placed Straw Doll Technique: Resonance or Extraction Technique.

Marking lets you strike from any distance, so take advantage to keep your opponents guessing!

Unleash Infinity and let yourself run wild!
• Use Technique Amplification: Blue to seal the movements of fleeing enemies, and Technique Reversal: Red to prevent encroaching foes from reaching you.
Hollow Purple is a powerful technique that consumes all.
• Once Domain Expansion: Unlimited Void has activated, Cursed Energy Techniques will change into special variations, making for a perfect opportunity to clinch a win!

A speedy Combo Master with nimble movements on top of impressive combo strings.

Show no quarter, and press the offensive before the enemy knows what's hit them!
• Evade enemy attacks with "Block and Counter".
You can also cancel your own attacks to chain into other moves!
Whip out original combos to overwhelm your foes!

CMD_CHARACTER_DESCRIPTION_CP_070.Text:
A special Striker who mixes light martial arts with powerful Cursed Speech to toy with foes.
Use Cursed Speech to apply constant pressure to the enemy's defenses.

• Cursed Speech attacks are powerful, but use them too much and you'll be the one taking damage.
• If your throat condition worsens, recovery is available with a drink of cough syrup.
• "Don't Move" and "Get Twisted" are powerful Cursed Energy Techniques that activate as counters. 
• The amount of Throat Gauge consumed through Cursed Speech differs depending on the gap in level between you and the enemy. Watch your foe, and unleash a devastating counterattack when the time is right!
Keep a close eye on your Cursed Energy Level gap before making your moves!

CMD_CHARACTER_DESCRIPTION_CP_080.Text:
With this dual-form, close-range Fighter, you can float like a panda, and sting like a...gorilla? 
Panda has moves that put him in a durable state, preventing flinching and attack interruption, so make good use of them!

• In Gorilla Mode, you are always in a durable state and move faster.
Light attacks won't faze you, so feel free to go ape on your foes!
• Damage from the Drumming Beat is anything but blockable!
Pour on the pain, even against guarding enemies!

• His Potential, "Cursed Energy Release," activates when time's almost run out, giving him a sizeable power-up.
This ex-salaryman has no time for overtime!

Even though many of his attacks are close range, since he is able to switch positions with Boogie Woogie, he can close in on foes and evade attacks as he pleases.

• Boogie Woogie lets him switch with any target, so use it wisely, and often!
• His extreme strength sends foes flying with every strike, but you can still deliver follow-up attacks by switching positions!

Skillful teamwork will still be essential, but with Boogie Woogie, you have the ability to turn a disadvantage in your favor!

A flying Striker who uses her unrivaled aerial movement to befuddle her foes.

• "Charge" lets you move at high speed while attacking.
Knock the enemy off balance, then use that opening to deal massive damage with Tool Manipulation: Wind Scythe!
• Her Potential, "Tool Manipulation," utilizes the field three-dimensionally, offering mobility that lets you attack from anywhere!

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_180_1000.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to strike with a broom.
While attacking, repeating the input can be used to chain into a Cursed Energy Technique.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_180_1060.Text:
A mid-range attack that generates a whirlwind moving forward.
This attack cannot be blocked with a guard.
Triggers a Joint Attack Chance if it lands while engaging in tag team combat.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_180_2000.Text:
A close-range attack that swoops down to charge at the enemy.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_180_2060.Text:
A vertical dive on the spot.
Can be held down.
This move can be followed with a dash or chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_180_3000.Text:
A mid-range shot that generates wind to fire at the enemy.
The wind spreads on impact and launches enemies upward.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_180_3060.Text: A close-range attack that sweeps the broom on the spot to generate wind.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_180_4000.Text: Charges forward forcefully while riding a broom. Use while charging to turn. Movement speed increases after attacking, and Extraction Techniques using wind-based attacks are enhanced. Can be held down. Cursed Energy Level 2: Increases damage dealt. Raises effect of buff. Cursed Energy Level 3: Further increases damage dealt. Raises effect of buff.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_180_5000.Text:
Launches a long-range Wind Scythe at the enemy.
Cursed Energy Level 2: Increases damage dealt.
Cursed Energy Level 3: Further increases damage dealt.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_180_8000.Text:
This attack cannot be blocked with a guard.
Land a kick while riding your broom to activate.
Blasts the enemy into the air where they can't escape, then inflicts heavy damage with Tool Manipulation: Wind Scythe.

CMD_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_CP_180_1000.Text:
Take flight atop a broom.
Hold jump to fly higher.
You will glide through the air, recovering your Dash Gauge.

CMD_CHARACTER_DESCRIPTION_CP_190.Text:
A long-range attacker who corners enemies by using a variety of archery and Blood Manipulation attacks.

• Perform a variety of archery-based attacks to catch the enemy off guard and unleash the ultimate technique: Blood Manipulation.
• Blood Manipulation: Slicing Exorcism makes it easy to target mobile enemies, so damage is sure to be dealt.
• The more Blood Manipulation: Convergence/Piercing Blood is charged up, the more your range and force increases, giving you a chance to pierce your enemy in a single blow!
Keep calm, watch your enemy's movement, and aim to take them down in one shot!

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_190_1000.Text:
A long-range attack that unleashes one arrow after the other at the enemy.
While attacking, repeating the input can be used to chain into a Cursed Energy Technique.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_190_1060.Text:
A long-range attack that draws the bow hard to unleash an arrow.
This attack cannot be blocked with a guard.
Triggers a Joint Attack Chance if it lands while engaging in tag team combat.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_190_2000.Text:
A long-range attack that unleashes an arrow straight ahead with range and speed.
Can be held down.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_190_2060.Text:
A long-range attack that rains down multiple arrows on all enemies within range.
Hold to specify where the attack lands.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_190_3000.Text:
A long-range attack that fires arrows in three directions.
Can be charged to unleash homing arrows on your enemy using Blood Manipulation.
Can be held down.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_190_3060.Text:
Stay in place and throw a blood bag at the enemy when attacked.
Landing the bag on the enemy will drench them in blood, making it possible to stop them in their tracks.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_190_4000.Text:
A long-range homing attack that launches a rotating, circular blade of compressed blood.
Number of blades launched increases depending on Cursed Energy Level.
Can be held down.
Cursed Energy Level 2: Increases number of blades launched. Increases Blood Bag Gauge consumption.
Cursed Energy Level 3: Further increases number of blades launched. Further increases Blood Bag Gauge consumption.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_190_5000.Text:
A long-range attack that compresses blood to shoot straight ahead at high speed.
Range and damage increase the more it is charged.
Can be held down.
Cursed Energy Level 2: Increases amount that can be charged.
Cursed Energy Level 3: Further increases amount that can be charged.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_190_8000.Text:
This attack cannot be blocked with a guard.
Activated when the arrow pierces the enemy.
After the arrow hits, Piercing Blood is unleashed for massive damage.

CMD_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_CP_190_1000.Text:
The amount of Blood Bag Gauge consumed depends on the Blood Manipulation technique used.
Consumes health if used when Blood Bag Gauge is empty.
Gauge is not consumed with Joint Attacks and Awakened Moves.

CMD_PASSIVE_NAME_CP_190_2000.Text: Pride of the Next Family Head

CMD_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_CP_190_2000.Text:
Reduces amount of blood consumed when health is at half or lower.
When Blood Bag Gauge is empty, amount of health consumed is reduced.

CMD_CHARACTER_DESCRIPTION_CP_200.Text:
The Sorcerer Killer who lays waste to enemies with his unusual Cursed Tools and gifted physique that is the result of a Heavenly Pact.

• His High-Speed Movement can be used to cancel attacks and chain into others.
No letting up on offense, here!
• Inverted Spear of Heaven: Slash unleashes different attacks depending on your orientation to your opponent.
Combine it with High-Speed Movement to create devastating combos!

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_200_1000.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to slash with Inverted Spear of Heaven.
While attacking, additional inputs can be used to chain into Cursed Tool Techniques.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_200_1060.Text:
A close-range attack that steps forward to strike as hard as you can.
This attack cannot be blocked with a guard.
Triggers a Joint Attack Chance if it lands while engaging in tag team combat.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_200_2000.Text: A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to unleash a thrust with Inverted Spear of Heaven.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_200_2060.Text:
A close-range attack that leaps up and forward before descending on the enemy with Inverted Spear of Heaven.
Sends the enemy flying when you hit the ground.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_200_3000.Text: Consumes the Dash Gauge to move at high speed. After moving, you can perform further movements with additional inputs. You can chain into this move from the stun of other moves, and you can chain into certain move during guiding moves. Can be chained into other moves after moving. Move toward the opponent. or + Move diagonally forward. + Move forward.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_200_3060.Text:
Stay in place and slash with Inverted Spear of Heaven.
Launches a counterattack if an enemy attacks you during this.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_200_4000.Text:
A powerful blow with Inverted Spear of Heaven.
Unleashes a different attack depending on your orientation to the opponent.
Physical Strength Level 2: Increases damage dealt.
Physical Strength Level 3: Further increases damage dealt.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_200_5000.Text:
A swift flurry of strikes with Inverted Spear of Heaven.
Can be held down.
Physical Strength Level 2: Increases the number of attacks.
Physical Strength Level 3: Further increases the number of attacks.

CMD_COMMAND_NAME_CP_200_8000.Text: Chain of a Thousand Miles and Inverted Spear of Heaven

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_200_8000.Text:
This attack cannot be blocked with a guard.
Land a thrust with Inverted Spear of Heaven to activate.
Connects Chain of a Thousand Miles and Inverted Spear of Heaven to deal massive damage with a dizzying barrage of blows.

CMD_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_CP_200_1000.Text:
Landing a finishing blow increases your Physical Strength Level, and temporarily reduces Dash Gauge consumption.
At maximum Physical Strength Level, this instead causes your Physical Strength Gauge to recover.

CMD_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_CP_200_2000.Text:
Be endowed with exceptional physical abilities in exchange for a complete lack of Cursed Energy.
Can jump midair numerous times.

CMD_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_CP_200_3000.Text: Attacks from Inverted Spear of Heaven forcefully release enemy Cursed Techniques.

CMD_CHARACTER_DESCRIPTION_CP_210.Text:
A close-range attacker who utilizes the Quick Draw technique to cut down enemies with lightning-fast strikes.

• Her Potential "New Shadow Style: Quick Draw" allows her to perform a quick and powerful attack starting from a sheathed stance.
Try to keep her sword sheathed during battle to gain the upper hand.
• Automatically counterattacks all foes who enter her New Shadow Style: Simple Domain for huge damage.
Close the distance between you and your enemy with the Cursed Technique New Shadow Style: Quick Draw when you are ready to go on the offensive.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_210_1000.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to unleash a diagonal slash.
On hit, automatically perform a follow up attack and go into Sheathed Stance.
Further repeating the input will allow you to use a Cursed Energy Technique.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_210_1060.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to launch the enemy and slash them.
This attack cannot be blocked with a guard.
Triggers a Joint Attack Chance if it lands while engaging in tag team combat.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_210_2000.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to slash them.
On hit, kick the enemy to send them flying and go into Sheathed Stance.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_210_2060.Text:
A close-range attack where you sheathe your sword and are guided to the enemy to unleash a double slash.
Can perform the double slash instantly if you are already in Sheathed Stance.
This attack can be chained into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_210_3000.Text:
【Unsheathed Stance】
Sheathe your sword where you stand.
【Sheathed Stance】
A close-range attack where you instantly leap forward to unleash a Quick Slice.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_210_3060.Text:
Evade in the direction you want while sheathing your sword.
Will only perform an evade if your sword is already sheathed.
Can chain into other moves after evading.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_210_4000.Text:
A close-range attack where you sheathe your sword and are guided to the enemy to unleash a devastating unsheathing slice.
Can perform the slice instantly if you are already in Sheathed Stance.
Cursed Energy Level 2: Increases damage dealt. Expands area of attack.
Cursed Energy Level 3: Further increases damage dealt. Further expands area of attack.

CMD_COMMAND_NAME_CP_210_5000.Text: New Shadow Style: Simple Domain, Quick Draw

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_210_5000.Text:
Sheathes sword where you stand and lays out a Simple Domain.
Can perform much quicker from Sheathed Stance.
Automatically attacks any enemies who enter the Domain.
Automatically parries any attacks that come from outside the Domain.
Able to chain into Sheathe Evasion while laying out the Simple Domain.
Can be held down.
When performed in midair, you will come down to the ground.
Cursed Energy Level 2: Increases damage dealt. Expands area of Domain.
Cursed Energy Level 3: Further increases damage dealt. Further expands area of Domain.

CMD_COMMAND_NAME_CP_210_8000.Text: New Shadow Style: Simple Domain, Quick Draw

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_210_8000.Text:
This attack cannot be guarded against.
Activates upon landing an upward slice on the opponent.
Lays out a Simple Domain, and automatically inflicts heavy damage on any enemies who enter it.

CMD_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_CP_210_1000.Text:
Enter Sheathed Stance after using certain attacks.
In Sheathed Stance, certain attacks will be performed quicker and guiding range for some attacks will be increased.
You will enter Unsheathed Stance if you guard while in the stance or are knocked back.
Perform a Perfect Guard to maintain the stance.

CMD_CHARACTER_DESCRIPTION_CP_220.Text:
An attacker who packs some serious firepower as well as astounding Cursed Energy output due to a Heavenly Pact.

• His Potential "Heavenly Pact" allows him to unleash Cursed Energy Techniques without being limited by Cursed Energy Levels.
• Take advantage of the grave damage he can deal right from the start of the battle to gain the upper hand!
• Utilize his high-mobility Extraction Techniques to dance around the battlefield and confuse your opponent.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_220_1000.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to unleash a flurry of melee strikes.
While attacking, additional input can be used to chain into a Cursed Energy Technique.
This attack can be chained into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_220_1060.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy using jet propulsion and let you launch them into the air.
This attack cannot be blocked with a guard.
Triggers a Joint Attack Chance if it lands while engaging in tag team combat.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_220_2000.Text: A mid-range attack in which you fire Ultra Cannon from your left hand to incinerate a large area.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_220_2060.Text:
Transforms right arm into a spiky shield and braces.
While in this stance, you can deflect incoming attacks with Ultra Shield.
This move will stun enemies if the counter is successful.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_220_3000.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy using jet propulsion to unleash two kicks.
Has increased charge time when used while overheated.
This attack can be chained into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_220_3060.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy using jet propulsion to unleash a rapid uppercut that will launch them upward.
Has increased charge time when used while overheated.
This attack can be chained into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_NAME_CP_220_4000.Text: Sword Option Boost On: Ultra Spin

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_220_4000.Text:
Produce a blade from your right arm, then spin rapidly towards the enemy using jet propulsion.
Can be held down.
Cursed Energy Level 2: Press repeatedly to increase the number of attacks.
Cursed Energy Level 3: Press repeatedly to further increase the number of attacks.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_220_5000.Text:
A long-range attack in which you charge and unleash Cursed Energy from your left hand.
Can be held down.
Cursed Energy Level 2: Increases damage dealt.
Cursed Energy Level 3: Further increases damage dealt.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_220_8000.Text:
This attack cannot be guarded against.
Activated by hitting an enemy with a projectile.
Use the turret in your mouth and two hand cannons together to fire Ultimate Cannon and deal massive damage to the enemy.

CMD_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_CP_220_1000.Text:
Allows you to activate stronger Cursed Techniques than that of your current Cursed Energy Level.
Can be activated by holding down the input for a period of time while using a Cursed Technique.
Based on the difference between the Cursed Energy Level activated and your current level, you will temporarily overheat and experience a reduction in your movement speed and Cursed Energy recovery speed.

CMD_CHARACTER_DESCRIPTION_CP_230.Text:
A blood-based attacker who is highly specialized in offense and adept at attacking from any distance.

• With Blood Manipulation: Flowing Red Scale activated, deal damage with Combo or Extraction Techniques while also gaining a massive speed boost. Use this speed to get up and personal with your foe in an instant.
• At Cursed Energy Level 3, Blood Manipulation: Convergence/Piercing Blood can be aimed right and left for a sweeping attack. Take down multiple enemies from afar with this formidable technique.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_230_1000.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to unleash a series of strikes.
While attacking, repeating the input can be used to chain into a Cursed Energy Technique.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_230_1060.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to launch them.
This attack cannot be blocked with a guard.
Triggers a Joint Attack Chance if it lands while engaging in tag team combat.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_230_2000.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to unleash two rapid slashes.
This move will temporarily reduce enemy's speed on hit.
The presence of blood spheres increases damage dealt and Cursed Energy gained.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_230_2060.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to unleash a hardened blood blow and send them flying.
This move will temporarily reduce enemy's speed on hit.
The presence of blood spheres increases damage dealt and Cursed Energy gained.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_230_3000.Text:
A long-range attack that launches a rotating, circular blade of compressed blood.
This move will temporarily reduce enemy's speed on hit.
Consumes 1 blood sphere.
Creates new blood spheres if none are available.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_230_3060.Text:
A close-range attack in which you unleash a torrent of blood that turns into countless spikes.
This move will temporarily reduce enemy's speed on hit.
Consumes 1 blood sphere.
Creates new blood spheres if none are available.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_230_4000.Text:
Control the components of blood to improve physical ability.
While in effect, damage can be dealt through Combo Techniques/Extraction Techniques. It also has the following effects: increased attack speed, increased guide speed, increased dash speed, decreased Dash Gauge consumption, and increased damage dealt to guard.

Continuously consumes Cursed Energy and is lifted when another input is made or Cursed Energy is reduced to zero.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_230_5000.Text: A long-range attack that compresses blood to shoot straight ahead at high speed. Range and damage increase the more it is charged. This move will temporarily reduce opponent's speed on hit. Consumes 1 blood sphere. Creates new blood spheres if none are available. Can be held down. Cursed Energy Level 2: Shortens charge time. Cursed Energy Level 3: Press after firing Piercing Blood to perform a sweeping motion.

CMD_COMMAND_NAME_CP_230_7000.Text: Blood Manipulation: Flowing Red Scale, Stack

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_230_8000.Text:
This attack cannot be guarded against.
Activated by landing a back kick.
Release blood compressed with Convergence for an omnidirectional projectile attack that deals massive damage to your enemy.

CMD_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_CP_230_1000.Text: Can be used once multiple blood spheres have been created. Some powerful attacks will consume blood spheres. Number of blood spheres you can create will increase based on your Cursed Energy Level. If you have no blood spheres left, then you can create more by using , +, or .

CMD_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_CP_230_2000.Text:
This move will temporarily reduce opponent's speed on hit if using poisonous blood.
Degree of speed reduction depends on Cursed Energy Level.

CMD_CHARACTER_DESCRIPTION_CP_240.Text:
A close-range attacker who commands her crows to attack and defend her while also using allies to help her fight.

• Her Cursed Energy Technique "Black Bird Manipulation" can be used not only to automatically block attacks, but also to make her crows assault enemies. Make constant use of her crows to keep the battle in your favor.
• Her Potential "A Life Practically Embodying Service" boosts her powers the more others work together with her. This effect lasts throughout the battle, so aim to work with others as much as possible.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_240_1000.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to unleash a series of axe blows.
While attacking, repeating the input can be used to chain into a Cursed Energy Technique.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_240_1060.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to launch them with the back of your axe.
This attack cannot be blocked with a guard.
Triggers a Joint Attack Chance if it lands while engaging in tag team combat.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_240_2000.Text:
Guides you to the enemy to perform a close-range axe attack that will launch them upward.
Press again to perform a follow-up attack and send them flying.
Can chain into a downward thrust from first stage.
Can chain into Black Bird Manipulation from second stage.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_240_2060.Text:
A close-range attack in which you jump up and plummet down diagonally, axe-first.
When performed in midair, you will drop down on the spot.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_240_3000.Text:
A close-range attack that guides you to the enemy to launch them into the air with your axe before striking them back down to the ground.
Repeating the input can be used to send the enemy flying.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_240_3060.Text:
A close-range attack that allows you to trample the enemy before leaping high into the air.
This attack can be chained into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_240_4000.Text: A close-range attack that allows you to dash while wielding your axe, which can then chain into other attacks by repeating the input. Can move in any direction while dashing. Swing the axe around and attack while spinning. + Leap high into the air, then come back down while bringing down your axe in a powerful blow. Can be activated immediately from a normal stance. Cursed Energy Level 2: Increases dash speed. Increases dash duration. Increases damage dealt. Cursed Energy Level 3: Further increases dash speed. Further increases dash duration. Further increases damage dealt.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_240_5000.Text:
Summon a murder of crows around you.
The birds will trail you and protect you from exactly 1 enemy attack.
Upon successfully blocking an attack, the crows will vanish.
Repeated input will allow you to target the enemy and direct the crows to attack them.
Can move while directing crows to attack, as well as instruct crows while dashing when using Spinning Slash/Downward Slash.
Cursed Level 2: Increases damage dealt.
Cursed Level 3: Further increases damage dealt.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_240_8000.Text:
This attack cannot be guarded against.
Land a thrust with axe to activate.
Can deal heavy damage by ramming into the enemy after forcing crows to sacrifice themselves, which removes any limits on Cursed Energy.

CMD_PASSIVE_NAME_CP_240_1000.Text: A life practically embodying service potential.

CMD_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_CP_240_1000.Text:
The following effects will be gained each time a set amount of Cooperation Bonuses activate:
Increased dash speed
Decreased Dash Gauge consumption
Decreased delay after a dash
Increased Cursed Energy recovery speed
Decreased delay after a guard
The above will be effective throughout the battle.
Has upper limit.

CMD_CHARACTER_DESCRIPTION_CP_270.Text: The Fastest Sorcerer who employs high-risk, high-return Cursed Techniques to completely disorient his opponents. • His Potential, "Projection Sorcery," induces high-speed movement from attack chains using his Cursed Technique. This consumes Cursed Energy automatically and requires careful application; otherwise he will freeze up when he doesn't have enough. • His Cursed Energy Technique "Projection Sorcery: Strike" can be chained from Extraction Techniques , or by repeating the input. The more times Projection Sorcery is triggered during a combo, the higher the damage.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_270_1000.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to unleash a series of blows.
While attacking, repeating the input can be used to chain into a Cursed Energy Technique.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_270_1060.Text:
A close-range attack that guides you to the enemy to unleash a palm strike.
This attack cannot be blocked with a guard.
If the enemy hit is not in a stagger state, they will freeze.
Triggers a Joint Attack Chance if it lands while engaging in tag team combat.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_270_2000.Text:
A close-range attack that guides you to the enemy to launch them into the air before striking them back down to the ground.
While attacking, repeating the input can be used to chain into a Cursed Energy Technique.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_270_2060.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to unleash an uppercut while jumping.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_270_3000.Text:
A close-range attack that will guide you to the enemy to unleash a series of kicks.
While attacking, repeating the input can be used to chain into a Cursed Energy Technique.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_270_3060.Text:
A close-range attack that guides you to the enemy after leaping back to land a sharp kick.
This attack can chain into other moves.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_270_4000.Text:
Stand in place and use Projection Sorcery to guide you to the enemy and unleash a brutal, close-range attack.
Dash or jump while in the stance to move in any direction up to 2 times.
Use a Combo Technique or Extraction Technique while in the stance or after moving to chain into other moves using Projection Sorcery.
Can use immediately without getting into stance when chained from other moves.
Damage dealt with Projection Sorcery changes only based on the number of times it has been used.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_270_5000.Text:
A close-range attack that guides you to the enemy with Projection Sorcery to freeze the opponent upon contact and deal a flurry of attacks.
Repeated input at the right time can be used to chain into other moves.
If the technique fails, you will temporarily freeze.
Cursed Energy 2: Increases damage dealt.
Cursed Energy 3: Further increases damage dealt.

CMD_COMMAND_DESCRIPTION_CP_270_8000.Text:
This attack cannot be guarded against.
Activated by successfully rushing the enemy.
Use Projection Sorcery to build up your speed and deal massive damage with a swift barrage of attacks.

CMD_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_CP_270_1000.Text:
Activates when chained into other moves while attacking.
Automatically uses Cursed Energy to move you to the enemy with Projection Sorcery instead of guiding you.
All moves performed from Projection Sorcery are single-hit attacks.
If lacking sufficient Cursed Energy, the technique will fail and you will temporarily freeze.
Further damage can be dealt by using Projection Sorcery to create multiple attack chains.

CMD_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_CP_270_2000.Text: When the opponent is actively expanding their Domain, your guard will turn into Falling Blossom Emotion. This continuously consumes Cursed Energy to counter the Domain and protect you. You will be immune from knock back and Guard Break. If you lack sufficient Cursed Energy, you will just perform a normal guard instead.
